log: REASONING: Throwing rock at Aetherborn — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:14+9=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 29 damage. Aetherborn — Winged Striker HP: 38/67
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:1+3=4 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Aetherborn — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:20+6=26 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 21 damage. Aetherborn — Winged Striker HP: 17/67
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Aetherborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 17/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Ogre (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:12+-2=10 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 54/59

→ Aetherborn — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
